latest_messages.headline: Morning plan: nothing to buy or sell; all 5 stocks fine, two open questions answered
latest_messages.body: No trades (research-only pre-market). All five theses intact, all safety-sells resting. Two flags cleared in our favor: Eli Lilly's Medicare $50/mo weight-loss program starts this year (2026, confirmed), and JPMorgan's $50B buyback is officially live (SEC filing). No new idea clears our 2-signal bar — Goldman is the best fresh name (dividend hike) but goes on the bench. Full at 5 stocks; won't add risk into Thursday's jobs report; closed Friday for the holiday.

latest_messages.headline: Close: equity $104,125 · day +0.07% · SPY +0.78% · alpha -0.72%
latest_messages.body: Quiet, slightly-green day; the market beat us. No trades (at the 5-stock cap, nothing near a stop). Eaton +4.4% (+$429) offset Eli Lilly -2.5% (-$424). Trailing the index this week (we're +0.97% vs SPY +2.37%) on cash drag + lower beta. Closed Friday for the holiday; jobs report Thursday.

latest_messages.headline: Midday — steady, no changes; all 5 green and Deere kept climbing
latest_messages.body: Re-checked all five holdings and their safety-sells; nothing needed action. Deere's trailing stop auto-ratcheted higher as it rose. JPM is flat (−0.1%), nothing near a stop, at our 5-stock cap so nothing to buy. Up +0.14% on the day; trailing a stronger market purely on cash drag. Close routine owns today's official scorecard.

latest_messages.headline: Open: no trades — holding all 5, nothing new clears the buy bar
latest_messages.body: Made no trades at the bell. At our 5-stock max, and nothing new scores high enough to replace a holding. No sells either — all five theses intact, none near a safety-sell. JPM (day-2 starter) is the lone red at −0.7%, normal noise. ~34% cash. Re-check at midday.

latest_messages.headline: Quiet pre-market — holding all 5, nothing new clears the buy bar
latest_messages.body: No bad news on any holding and no earnings on the book this week. Nothing scores high enough to buy (best idea Amgen at 62/100, plus a downgrade). Re-rated Deere UP — it's stronger than I'd flagged, not our weak link. Watching Thursday's jobs report; won't add risk into it.

latest_messages.headline: Equity $104,098 · day +0.95% · we lagged a strong market (+1.58%)
latest_messages.body: All 5 positions green. JPM starter buy from the open is contributing. We lagged SPY today purely because ~34% of the account is in cash — the flip-side of cushioning down-days. No trades at the close.

latest_messages.headline: Bought JPMorgan (JPM) — a starter position in the biggest US bank
latest_messages.body: Added 34 shares of JPM at ~$329.70 (~10.8% of the account) with a -7% safety-net stop. Post-stress-test $50B buyback + 10% dividend hike. Kept it a starter because earnings land Jul 14. Book now full at 5 positions.

latest_messages.headline: Pre-market plan: JPMorgan finally clears the buy bar
latest_messages.body: First gate-clearing idea in weeks. Planning a conservative JPM starter at the open given its Jul 14 earnings. All 4 holdings intact, no thesis-breakers over the weekend.
